name: DeepPaperNote
description_en: Deep-read a single paper—given a title, DOI, URL, arXiv ID, Zotero item, or local PDF—and generate a high-quality, well-structured Markdown reading note with evidence-based analysis and figure placeholders, saved into an Obsidian-style vault.
description_zh: 深读单篇论文——给定标题、DOI、URL、arXiv ID、Zotero 条目或本地 PDF——生成结构清晰、有据可循的高质量 Markdown 精读笔记(含图位占位),写入 Obsidian 风格的知识库。
long_en: Focuses on one paper at a time to produce a polished, navigable note rather than a shallow summary, fitting straight into a personal knowledge base.
long_zh: 一次只聚焦一篇论文,产出可精读、可导航的笔记而非浅层摘要,直接融入个人知识库。
sec_note_en: Reads the paper you point it at and writes notes into your vault or workspace; verify its analysis against the source.
sec_note_zh: 读取你指定的论文并把笔记写入你的库或工作区;请将其分析与原文核对。
